name: Hair Atelier
tagline: Luxury cuts, colour, and restorative rituals

hero.headline: Transformative hair artistry
hero.subheadline: Meet stylists who blend runway technique with restorative care.

about.headline: About Hair Atelier
about.body: Hair Atelier is a luminous studio built for people who want their hair to feel like a reflection of how they see themselves. We listen first, then design each cut, colour, and repair ritual around your lifestyle, texture, and confidence goals. Expect calming care, honest guidance, and finishing details that make the mirror moment feel personal.

highlights.title: Colour Atelier
highlights.body: Dimensional colouring with gloss and shine finishes, mapped to your undertone and maintenance comfort for a radiant, lived-in look.

highlights.title: Repair lounge
highlights.body: Bond-building treatments and scalp therapy that soothe, strengthen, and restore softness without weighing hair down.

highlights.title: Editorial styling
highlights.body: Event-ready looks for every occasion, from effortless polish to statement styling with lasting hold.

services.headline: Hair services
services.body: Choose bespoke services tailored to your hair goals.

relatedConsultants.headline: Available stylists
relatedConsultants.body: Book a hair stylist approved for this service.
relatedConsultants.emptyMessage: Stylist availability varies by date. Check back soon.

services.title: Signature Cut
services.description: Precision shaping with consultation and styling. Includes consultation, prep, finishing, and aftercare guidance. Pricing starts at R350.

details.longDescription: A precision cut tailored to your face shape, hair density, and lifestyle. Includes a full consultation, sectioned shaping, and a finish that matches your desired movement and texture.
prepSteps: Arrive with clean, detangled hair for accurate assessment.
Bring a few reference photos to align on length and shape.
Avoid heavy oils or styling products on the day of service.
aftercareSteps: Wait 24 hours before heavy heat styling.
Use a lightweight leave-in to maintain softness.
Book a maintenance trim every 6 to 8 weeks.

services.title: Colour Glow
services.description: Custom colour placement with gloss finish. Includes consultation, prep, finishing, and aftercare guidance. Pricing starts at R1200.

details.longDescription: A custom colour placement with dimensional shine and toning for a high-gloss finish. Ideal for refreshing tone or adding depth while preserving hair health.
prepSteps: Share any previous colour history during consultation.
Arrive with dry hair for more accurate tone mapping.
Avoid oil treatments for 48 hours beforehand.
aftercareSteps: Wait 48 hours before your first wash.
Use sulfate-free, colour-safe shampoo.
Schedule a gloss refresh every 6 to 8 weeks.

services.title: Repair Ritual
services.description: Bond repair with scalp massage and hydration. Includes consultation, prep, finishing, and aftercare guidance. Pricing starts at R550.

details.longDescription: Bond-repair therapy paired with scalp massage and hydration to restore strength and elasticity. Best for colour-treated or heat-stressed hair.
prepSteps: Skip heavy styling products on the day of service.
Let your stylist know about any scalp sensitivity.
Bring your current product list for best recommendations.
aftercareSteps: Limit heat styling for the next 72 hours.
Use a weekly bond-repair mask.
Hydrate with a lightweight leave-in between washes.

services.title: Blowout Ritual
services.description: Signature blowout with heat protection and finishing gloss. Includes consultation, prep, finishing, and aftercare guidance. Pricing starts at R280.

details.longDescription: A signature blowout that focuses on smoothness, body, and long-lasting finish. Includes heat protection and finishing gloss for shine.
prepSteps: Arrive with clean, towel-dried hair if possible.
Share your preferred volume and texture goals.
Remove heavy hair accessories before service.
aftercareSteps: Use a silk wrap or loose bun overnight.
Avoid moisture and steam for 24 hours.
Refresh with a lightweight dry spray if needed.

services.title: Texture Reset
services.description: Curl defining treatment with custom moisture blend. Includes consultation, prep, finishing, and aftercare guidance. Pricing starts at R650.

details.longDescription: A curl-defining treatment with customized moisture balance and shaping to enhance natural texture. Ideal for curls, coils, and waves.
prepSteps: Arrive with hair in its natural state, if possible.
Avoid heavy oils the day before.
Share your typical wash-and-go routine.
aftercareSteps: Use curl-friendly, sulfate-free products.
Diffuse on low heat or air dry.
Refresh midweek with a water-based mist.

services.title: Precision Fringe Refresh
services.description: Fringe redesign and soft face-framing balance. Includes consultation, prep, finishing, and aftercare guidance. Pricing starts at R220.

details.longDescription: A focused fringe redesign service to refine your silhouette, blend framing sections, and restore shape between major cuts.
prepSteps: Arrive 10 minutes early for a smooth check-in.
Share any sensitivities or preferences before treatment begins.
Avoid heavy products on the treatment area before your session.
aftercareSteps: Follow the recommended at-home care plan for best results.
Stay hydrated and avoid harsh products for 24 hours.
Book your next maintenance session based on your consultant guidance.

consultants.headline: Hair stylists
consultants.body: Meet stylists known for creativity, care, and technique.

relatedServices.headline: Services by this stylist
relatedServices.body: Choose a service this stylist performs.

consultants.name: Amara Chen
consultants.bio: Specialises in dimensional colour and glossing. Known for thoughtful consultations and tailored recommendations.
consultants.extendedBio: Amara leads colour strategy for the atelier, specialising in dimensional blends, glossing, and tone mapping. Her consultations focus on lifestyle, maintenance comfort, and long-term hair health.

consultants.name: Noah Rivera
consultants.bio: Precision cuts with modern, wearable shapes. Known for thoughtful consultations and tailored recommendations.
consultants.extendedBio: Noah is a precision cutting specialist known for wearable shapes and clean architecture. He works with texture, growth patterns, and density to craft movement that lasts.

consultants.name: Sienna Patel
consultants.bio: Restorative rituals for healthy, glossy hair. Known for thoughtful consultations and tailored recommendations.
consultants.extendedBio: Sienna focuses on restorative hair rituals and scalp therapy. Her approach blends gentle care, science-backed treatments, and customized at-home plans.

consultants.name: Kai Alvarez
consultants.bio: Elevated styling for events, shoots, and everyday polish. Known for thoughtful consultations and tailored recommendations.
consultants.extendedBio: Kai specialises in elevated styling and event-ready finishes. From smooth blowouts to textured updos, Kai builds looks that hold up beautifully.

widget.headline: Finalize your booking
widget.body: Select your consultant, date, and time. You'll see a confirmation instantly.
widget.confirmationBody: We will send a reminder with prep details.
widget.missingSelection: Select a date and time to confirm.
widget.emptyConsultant: No consultants available for this service.
